title: Digimon Tamers: Boukensha-tachi no Tatakai
main_page_extract:
Ai Maeda (前田 愛, Maeda Ai; born April 19, 1975 in Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan) is a Japanese voice actress and singer associated with Aoni Production. As a singer, Maeda releases music under the stage name AiM and is credited as a songwriter under the name Ai.
